calls.query:
const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' .github/prompts/predict.md && sed -n '1,320p' AGENTS.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500221 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor && find data/cases/scotus/73500221 -maxdepth 5 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500221 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor; rg --files data/cases/scotus/73500221 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"ls -la data/cases/scotus/73500221 data/cases/scotus/73500221/events/evt-petition-disposition; ls -la data/cases/scotus/73500221/record 2>/dev/null || true; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73500221/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"printf '%s\\n' 'SNAPSHOTS'; rg --files --hidden data/cases/scotus/73500221/record/snapshots | sort; printf '%s\\n' 'DOCUMENTS'; rg --files --hidden data/cases/scotus/73500221/record/documents | sort; printf '%s\\n' 'CONTEXT'; sed -n '1,160p' data/cases/scotus/73500221/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73500221/record/snapshots/2026-07-18.json; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73500221/record/documents/documents.json; sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73500221/record/documents/questions-presented.txt; wc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73500221/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,560p' data/cases/scotus/73500221/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '561,1120p' data/cases/scotus/73500221/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -A90 -B8 \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition|Segment base rate by salience band|relist|CVSG|originating circuit|Tenth Circuit|2025 Term|Term 2025\" metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -A140 -B5 \"salience band|Salience|fee class|Fee class|paid\" metrics/statpack.md | head -220","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.scotus_cert_by_term // .cert_by_term // .scotus_cert_terms // empty' metrics/statpack.json | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '.sections | keys' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.terms | type, (if type==\"array\" then length else keys end)' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.terms' metrics/statpack.json | head -260","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --disposition granted --era 2020s --limit 10","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --disposition granted --era 2020s --limit 40 | jq -c 'select(.originating_court == \"ca10\")' | head -10","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const hits = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|case law|docket|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));
text(hits);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Knick takings claim preclusion state court merits exhaustion",court:["scotus","ca10"],filed_before:"2026-07-18",fields:["absolute_url","caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","docketNumber","citation","snippet"],num_results:10,order_by:"score desc"});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Knick takings claim preclusion state court merits exhaustion",court:["ca10"],filed_before:"2026-07-18",fields:["absolute_url","caseName","dateFiled","docketNumber","cluster_id","opinions"],num_results:5,order_by:"score desc"});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",docket_number:"25-5039",court:["ca10"],filed_before:"2026-07-18",fields:["absolute_url","caseName","dateFiled","docketNumber","cluster_id","opinions"],num_results:5});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"Rogne\" \"Catoosa\"",court:["ca10"],filed_before:"2026-07-18",fields:["absolute_url","caseName","dateFiled","docketNumber","cluster_id","opinions"],num_results:5});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) c.type === "image" ? image(c) : c.type === "text" ? text(c.text) : null;

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq -r '.sections[] | [.title, .scope] | @tsv' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.sections[] | select((.title // \"\") | test(\"salience\"; \"i\"))' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; test -e data/cases/scotus/73500221/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z && ls -la data/cases/scotus/73500221/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z || true; git status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73500221","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73500221/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000});
text(r.output);

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/scotus/73500221/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z/prediction.json
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0",
+  "case_id": "scotus/73500221",
+  "event_id": "evt-petition-disposition",
+  "predictor_id": "codex-baseline",
+  "engine": "codex",
+  "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
+  "run_id": "20260718T064904Z",
+  "created_at": "2026-07-1

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq empty data/cases/scotus/73500221/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z/prediction.json data/cases/scotus/73500221/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z/tooling.json && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg --files data/cases/scotus/73500221/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z | sort; git status --short --untracked-files=all -- data/cases/scotus/73500221/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000});
text(r.output);
